title: New GitHub stars fan out into per-stargazer intelligence. Company enrichment is shared, expensive calls are cost-gated, and the outreach packet NEVER auto-sends.

beats.name: cold-fan-out
beats.caption: a batch of new stars · the registry dedupes · three per-person lanes light up

beats.name: shared-company
beats.caption: alice + bob both at acme · the company resolver renders ONCE · both lanes share the receipt

beats.name: cost-gate
beats.caption: casey is low-signal · her Exa People call is gated OFF · no sample is built for her

beats.name: human-gate
beats.caption: alice's sample is built + run · the packet reaches ready_for_review · it STOPS — never auto-sent

beats.name: move-one-stargazer
beats.caption: new evidence on ALICE alone · only her lane lights · bob + casey stay DARK · absorbed at the footprint

beats.name: exa-fails
beats.caption: Exa People is DOWN for bob · person-bob fails LOUD (provider=exa) · prior identity stands · nothing downstream

beats.name: exa-recovers
beats.caption: Exa is back · bob's lane heals · the shared acme company render is STILL not re-run

beats.name: quiet-repoll
beats.caption: a re-poll with the same stars · the whole graph memo-SKIPS · cost flat near zero
